back_translation: Therefore, since Christ has suffered in the flesh, you also arm yourselves with the same intent, because the one who has suffered in the flesh has departed from sin
so that you may not live the remaining time in the flesh according to human desires, but according to the will of God
For the time that has passed has been enough for you to do what the Gentiles desire — having lived in debauchery, lust, drunkenness, riotous reveling, drinking parties, and detestable idolatry
Because of this they are surprised that you do not run with them into the same flood of reckless dissipation, and they revile you
They will have to give an account to Him who is ready to judge the living and the dead
For this reason the gospel was proclaimed even to those who have now died, so that they might be judged according to humans in the flesh, but live according to God in the spirit
Now the end of all things has drawn near. Therefore, be sound-minded and sober for the sake of prayer
Above all, have earnest love toward one another, because “love covers a multitude of sins”
Welcome one another with hospitality, without grumbling
Each one, when receiving any gift, serve one another with that gift, as good stewards of the manifold grace of God

If anyone speaks, let him speak as the words of God. If anyone serves, let him serve with the strength that God supplies, so that in all things God may receive honor through Jesus Christ. May glory and power be to Him forever and ever. Amen
Beloved, do not be surprised at the fiery trial that has come upon you, as though something strange has happened to you
But to the extent that you share in the sufferings of Christ, rejoice, so that when His glory is revealed, you also may rejoice abundantly
If you are reproached for the name of Christ, you are blessed, because the Spirit of glory and the Spirit of God dwells with you
Do not let any of you have to suffer as a murderer, a thief, a doer of evil, or a person who meddles in others’ affairs
But if one suffers as a Christian, do not let that person be ashamed, but let him glorify God in that name
For this is the time when judgment will begin from the household of God. If it begins first from us, what will the outcome be for those who do not obey the gospel of God?
And, “If the righteous person is barely saved, where will the ungodly and the sinner appear?”
Therefore, those who suffer according to the will of God should entrust their souls to the faithful Creator, along with continuing to do good
